channel.title: Download free software, update daily!
channel.description: Taiwebs.com - Download free software applications, full version, latest updates!

item.title: Download NetSpeedTray 1.3.0 + Portable
item.description: NetSpeedTray is a lightweight, open source network monitor for Windows that displays upload/download speeds directly on the Taskbar with a native look and feel. Designed to blend seamlessly with Windows 10/11 user interface. Includes intelligent detection of light and dark themes on the taskbar to ensure text is always visible. Sits quietly in the system tray without hogging resources. Features "Dynamic Update Rate" that automatically reduces update frequency when the network is idle to...

item.title: Download VovSoft Bulk QR Code Generator 2.6
item.description: QR Code are commonly used to contain data for locators, identifiers, or trackers that point to a web page. QR Code stores data efficiently by supporting different encoding modes such as numeric, alphanumeric, byte, binary. Generating thousands of QR Code with different data individually can be time consuming. But with VovSoft Bulk QR Code Generator, you can generate QR Code containing different plain texts at the same time by generating QR Code in bulk. Although there are various online...

item.title: Download Blank And Secure 8.39
item.description: Blank And Secure is a application lightweight and portable allows you to completely erase your sensitive data without possibility to restore. This add-on accomplish this by overwriting your files with zeros (0) before you delete them. This method is also called "zeroing data / drives". You should know that once completed, the complete data can't be recovered, so you should only use this tool if you want to permanently delete your files.
